title: Custom Hamilton Music 2
description: Changes the default disk music to music from Hamilton
body:
5- What'd I Miss

11- Stay Alive(Reprise)

13- Schuyler Defeated

blocks- The Adams Administration

cat- Your Obidient Servant

chirp- I Know Him

far- That Would Be Enough

mall- Yorktown(The World Turned Upside Down)

mellohi- Take a Break

otherside- Non-Stop

pigstep- It's Quiet Uptown

relic- What Comes Next?

stal- Guns and Ships

strad- The Election of 1800

wait- History Has Its Eyes On You

ward- The Reynolds Pamphlet

All songs are property of their respective artists

Please donate to The Broadway League Foundation.

About Charity: The Broadway League Foundation Inc. acts as The Broadway League's charitable arm. Its mission is to support the arts education, community engagement, and audience access programs of the Broadway League.

https://www.broadwayleague.com/about/foundation/

!DISCLAIMER! 

This does not include the new 1.21 disks, but I may add them in the future

also, this is compatible with 1.21.
